title: hornungia alpina subsp. auerswaldii
intro: Hornungia alpina subsp. auerswaldii is a subspecies of the Hornungia alpina plant, also known as alpine rockcress, which is a flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and even possessing antioxidant properties. Hornungia alpina subsp. auerswaldii can be prepared as an herbal remedy in the form of infusions, decoctions, or even essential oils, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
